name: ceramics-api

dependencies.name: ceramics-db
dependencies.description: Stores products, categories, carts, orders, addresses, and customer records.

dependencies.name: user-auth
dependencies.description: Validates signed-in customer/administrator identity via the platform gateway.

dependencies.name: payment-provider
dependencies.description: Charges the shopper's payment method during checkout via the provider's SDK.

config.description: Secret API key for the payment provider

dependencies.name: email-provider
dependencies.description: Sends order confirmation emails after successful checkout via the provider's SDK/API.

config.description: API key for the transactional email provider
From address used for order confirmation emails

description: Go API service owning the ceramics product catalog, shopping cart, checkout/order processing, and customer account data in an embedded/managed database. Guest carts are session-scoped; customer carts and order history are tied to the authenticated caller. Charges payments via payment-provider and sends order confirmations via email-provider. Does not render any UI and does not issue its own auth tokens (Thunder does).
